notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 16 CVEs: CVE-2025-40154, CVE-2025-40277, CVE-2025-68285, CVE-2025-68287, CVE-2023-53552, and 11 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
